channel.title: Retrospective on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Retrospective on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Fallout: Destiny Or Preparation?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about whether Fallout was destined to happen or the result of massive preparation.

item.title: Gaming In The 1980s
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about gaming in the 1980s.

item.title: Photos From Fallout Development (1994-1997)
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about a collection of Fallout photos I have from 1994 through 1997.

item.title: Don't Forget Temple Of Elemental Evil 2003
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to ask you not to forget about Temple of Elemental Evil, my 2003 video game.

item.title: Temple Development Timeline
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today let’s do the Temple of Elemental Evil development timeline.

item.title: The Canceling of Fallout Van Buren...And Me
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the cancellation of Fallout Van Buren and me.

item.title: Arcanum Development Timeline
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today let’s walk through the Arcanum development timeline.

item.title: Fallout 1 and 2 Box Covers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the Fallout 1 and two box covers and yes, I’m calling fallout Fallout one, just so I don’t say I’m talking about the Fallout box covers and then everyone will get confused.

item.title: Late-Stage Troika
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about late stage troa, because I’ve told a lot of troa stories already and you can look them up.

item.title: Playing My Older Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about playing my older games.

item.title: Developing Pillars Of Eternity
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about developing pillars of Eternity.

item.title: Fallout Regrets
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to answer a question from commenter Brian Eno 608 better be a real name, don’t taunt me like that.

item.title: Making of Bard's Tale Construction Set (1991)
item.description: Hi. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the making of Bard’s tail construction set.

item.title: Fallout Cut Content
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Fallout cut content.

item.title: Why I Left Fallout 2
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today let’s talk about Fallout 2 and why I left it I really think, if you haven’t, you should watch yesterday’s video.

item.title: Proposed Expansions to Vampire Bloodlines
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about two potential expansions — or you could say it’s SQL — that Troika had designed for Vampire: The Masquerade — Bloodlines.

item.title: Arcanum 2: Journey to the Center of Arcanum
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the sequel to Arcanum called Journey to the Center of Arcanum.
